overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hunter character with a large weapon exploring a hazy, rocky desert canyon. The character walks through narrow passages and open plains accompanied by a small cat-like companion, eventually reaching a still body of water at the edge of the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky canyon path carrying a large weapon on back

notable_agents.action: small cat-like companion following closely behind the character

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the narrow canyon passage
steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the narrow canyon passage
uneven dirt trail winding through the rocky canyon floor
large stratified rock formation visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls on both sides. The path is uneven dirt and gravel, with scattered boulders. A small cat-like companion follows closely behind as they move toward a large layered rock formation visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky plain with scattered acacia trees

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wide open rocky plain with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: traversing open terrain toward large rock formations, passing scattered acacia trees

notable_agents.action: cat-like companion maintaining pace with the character across the open plain

entered.detail: large acacia-style tree with spreading canopy casting shadows on the ground
dark still body of water visible in the distant hazy background
tall bioluminescent white flowers growing from the rocky soil

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide rocky plain with scattered acacia trees and large rock formations. The character continues walking as the canyon walls fall behind. A glowing white plant becomes visible on the right, and a dark pool of water appears in the distant haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with still dark water

events.description: approaches shoreline where cracked earth meets dark still water
character stops at water's edge and looks out across the surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge and stopping to look out across the dark still pool

notable_agents.action: companion stopping beside the character at the water's edge

entered.detail: dry cracked mud and stone terrain at the water's edge
dark calm water reflecting the hazy sky and surrounding rocks
steep layered rock walls rising on the opposite side of the water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the shoreline where cracked earth meets dark still water. The companion stops beside them as they gaze across the pool at the rock formations on the opposite bank. The scene ends with the character standing at the water's edge in the hazy, warm light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow rocky canyon into a vast, hazy desert plain that terminates at a still body of water. It begins with the character and a small cat-like companion navigating an uneven path of dirt and gravel between steep walls, moving toward a distant layered rock formation. As the canyon walls fall away, the scene opens into a wide rocky plain dotted with acacia trees and large boulders, where a glowing white plant appears to the right. The camera then follows the character across the expanse toward a dark pool of water shimmering in the haze. Finally, the movement settles at the shoreline where cracked earth meets the water's edge, leaving the pair to gaze across the still pool toward the opposite bank under a warm, hazy light.
